name: LLM External Ontology Memory (heterogeneous ingestion + SHACL/OWL generation-verification-correction)

paper.title: Automatic Ontology Construction Using LLMs as an External Layer of Memory, Verification, and Planning for Hybrid Intelligent Systems

difficulty.rationale: heterogeneous ingestion (document/api/dialogue) -> NER/RE -> normalization -> triple generation -> SHACL/OWL validation in a generation-verification-correction loop (accept/correct/reject) with continuous updates; deterministic mock, no GPU/finetuning. Scope: the construction+validation layer (planning/inference-time use from the paper is out of scope for the demo).
